name: New Jersey
why_ruby_pro: NJ ABC price filing automation — no more manual uploads
Multi-warehouse inventory across NJ's fragmented delivery zones
Excise tax calculated per gallon by product type, automatically
problem: ABC price filings done manually every posting period
Excise tax rates differ for wine, beer, and spirits — tracked in spreadsheets
Delivery zone complexity across North, Central, and South Jersey
difference: Auto-generate NJ ABC price postings from your live price books
Calculate excise tax per product type per order without manual math
Route and zone management built for NJ's delivery geography
how_it_works: Set up NJ-compliant pricing rules once — Ruby enforces them on every order
Excise tax, sales tax, and account-level pricing calculated in real time
See profitability by account, product, and territory across New Jersey
